title: Vector Database Architecture Comparison
description: Layered architecture comparison of FAISS, Pinecone, and Weaviate vector databases, with a feature matrix covering deployment, pricing, metadata, hybrid search, GPU support, and scalability.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

educational.learningObjective: Compare the architecture and deployment trade-offs of FAISS, Pinecone, and Weaviate vector databases.
